stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding aircraft engine turbochargers?

options.a: A ground boosted turbocharger increases manifold pressure only during take-off.
options.b: An altitude boosted turbocharger increases inlet manifold pressure once the aircraft has reached 10 000 ft.
options.c: The altitude-boosted turbocharger compensates for the loss of MAP with increased altitude.
options.d: Ground boosted turbochargers are switched to OFF once the aircraft has achieved a safe altitude.
